---
title: "Thibaut Lapeyre"
site: distill::distill_website
image: "images/photo_thibaut_lapeyre.jpg"
#favicon: "images/favicon.ico"
angle: 130
links:
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("envelope")` Email'
    url: "mailto:thibautlapeyre@psemail.eu"
  - label: '`r fontawesome::fa("github")` GitHub'
    url: "https://github.com/tiblapeyre"
output:
  distill::distill_article
resource_files:
  - "images/photo thibaut lapeyre.jpg"
  - "images/contis.jpg"
---

<style>
/* target only the postcard/profile image if you want, but OK to keep as is */
img { width: 300px !important; height: auto !important; }

body { font-size: 1.1rem; }

/* background image on top section */
body::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  height: 40vh;
  background-image: url("images/contis.jpg");  /* path relative to the HTML */
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center 40%;  /* move crop window up slightly */
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  opacity: 0.5;
  z-index: -1;
}
</style>

  
  Ph.D. Candidate at the Paris School of Economics working at the intersection of Transportation Economics and Experimental Economics under the supervision of Carine Staropoli (Paris School of Economics and University of Rouen Normandie) and Philippe Gagnepain (Paris School of Economics and Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne) ... for the [New Deal Urbain Research Chair](https://www.parisschoolofeconomics.eu/recherche/initiatives-recherche/chaires-de-recherche/new-deal-urbain/) and [Sustainable Long-Distance Mobility Chair](https://www.parisschoolofeconomics.eu/en/research/research-initiatives/research-chairs/sustainable-long-distance-mobility-chair/).
More precisely, I am working on solutions to induce changes in transportation habits towards more sustainable road modal options, using lab experiments.
